prompt: {"type":"cinematic 3-frame sequential film stills","style":"ultra-realistic, moody, natural light, shallow depth of field, muted earthy color grading, soft overcast atmosphere, subtle film grain","subject":{"count":1,"description":"young woman traveler with dark brown hair in a messy bun, wearing a dark oversized sweater, brown trousers, and hiking boots","face_visibility":"face turned away or in profile in all 3 frames"},"layout":{"orientation":"vertical triptych with 3 stacked horizontal frames separated by thin borders","sections":[{"title":"top frame","position":"top","count":1,"labels":["woman leaning with folded arms on a wooden fence, looking to the right"]},{"title":"middle frame","position":"center","count":1,"labels":["woman sitting alone in the middle of an empty winding road, holding a folded paper map, looking left"]},{"title":"bottom frame","position":"bottom","count":1,"labels":["rear view of woman wearing a rugged backpack, standing and looking over a lake and mountain valley"]}]},"environment":{"location":"remote highland landscape with rolling hills, sparse leafless trees, heather and brush, distant mountains, and a lake","weather":"cloudy, cool, slightly misty"},"camera":{"framing":"cinematic storytelling sequence, medium portrait in top frame, full-body seated shot in middle frame, medium back view in bottom frame","lens":"shallow-focus documentary photography look","aspect":"tall vertical image"},"details":{"props_count":3,"props":["wooden fence with a small circular trail marker sign showing a white house-like icon","folded paper map","brown canvas hiking backpack"]}}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"电影感 3 帧连续电影剧照","style":"超写实、忧郁、自然光、浅景深、柔和的大地色调、柔和的阴天氛围、细腻的胶片颗粒感","subject":{"count":1,"description":"年轻女性旅行者，深棕色凌乱发髻，身穿深色廓形毛衣、棕色长裤和登山靴","face_visibility":"3 帧中均为侧脸或背影"},"layout":{"orientation":"竖版三联画，由 3 个堆叠的横向画幅组成，中间有细边框分隔","sections":[{"title":"顶部画幅","position":"顶部","count":1,"labels":["女性双臂交叉倚靠在木栅栏上，向右看"]},{"title":"中间画幅","position":"中心","count":1,"labels":["女性独自坐在空旷蜿蜒的道路中央，手持折叠纸质地图，向左看"]},{"title":"底部画幅","position":"底部","count":1,"labels":["女性背影，背着粗犷的登山包，站立着眺望湖泊和山谷"]}]},"environment":{"location":"偏远的高地景观，有连绵起伏的丘陵、稀疏的落叶树木、石楠花和灌木丛、远处的山脉以及湖泊","weather":"多云、凉爽、微雾"},"camera":{"framing":"电影叙事序列，顶部画幅为中景人像，中间画幅为全身坐姿，底部画幅为中景背影","lens":"浅焦纪录片摄影风格","aspect":"高竖版图像"},"details":{"props_count":3,"props":["木栅栏，带有一个小的圆形路径标记牌，上面有白色房屋图标","折叠纸质地图","棕色帆布登山包"]}}

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影感 3 帧单人旅行剧照：一组写实的竖版三联画，展现了一位女性独自旅行者在三个忧郁户外场景中的画面，适用于电影叙事、旅行编辑视觉效果或电影剧照风格的图像生成。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 怀旧照片、纪实场景、人物生活方式、品牌氛围图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 摄影/真实场景 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic, documentary]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: natural light, overcast, shallow depth, depth of field, film grain, lens]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
